title: PS - Sorting Algorithms
description: Problem set rubric template for sorting algorithm questions.

criteria.title: Algorithm Comparison
criteria.description: Student compares two or more sorting algorithms and evaluates trade-offs.

levels.title: Complete
levels.description: Clear comparison with justified conclusion for the given scenario.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Partial comparison missing key trade-off analysis.

criteria.title: Recurrence and Runtime
criteria.description: Student sets up the recurrence for a divide-and-conquer sort and solves it.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Minor error in recurrence or solution.

criteria.title: Lower Bound Argument
criteria.description: Student argues why comparison-based sorting requires Ω(n log n) comparisons.

criteria.title: Written Explanation
criteria.description: Student explains the algorithm and results clearly in writing.

levels.title: Clear
levels.description: Explanation is clear, precise, and well-organized.

levels.title: Partial
levels.description: Explanation present but unclear or incomplete.
